# TranslationUIProviderContext

**Protocol**

An object that encapsulates the XPC communication between the host process and the third-party extension implementation.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol TranslationUIProviderContext : Observable
```

## Discussion

The framework provides information to the extension through the two observable properties [doc://com.apple.translationuiprovider/documentation/TranslationUIProvider/TranslationUIProviderContext/inputText] and [doc://com.apple.translationuiprovider/documentation/TranslationUIProvider/TranslationUIProviderContext/allowsReplacement], and the extension calls back to the host process using the functions [doc://com.apple.translationuiprovider/documentation/TranslationUIProvider/TranslationUIProviderContext/finish(translation:)] and, optionally [doc://com.apple.translationuiprovider/documentation/TranslationUIProvider/TranslationUIProviderContext/expandSheet()].

## Instance Properties

- **allowsReplacement**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the control can replace the source text.
- **inputText**: The source text to translate.

## Instance Methods

- **expandSheet()**: The framework requests that the sheet expand.
- **finish(translation:)**: Completes the translation after which the framework closes the sheet.

## Creating translation app extensions

- **TranslationUIProviderExtension**: A protocol that translation apps implement to provide a text-selection view.
- **TranslationUIProviderExtensionScene**: The protocol this extension’s scene need to implement.

## Inherits From

- Observable
